name: gpt-image-canvas
description: Local professional AI canvas powered by tldraw and GPT Image 2.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "corepack pnpm api:dev" "corepack pnpm web:dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/extension build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/extension typecheck
